expectations.evidence: Wrote directly to ~/.zshrc using cat heredoc. No knowledge of ecosystem.env.
Used PUSHOVER_USER and PUSHOVER_TOKEN instead of the expected PUSHOVER_USER_KEY and PUSHOVER_APP_TOKEN.

expectations.text: Advises reloading the shell (source ~/.zshrc) after changes
Does not expose credentials in any insecure way
expectations.evidence: Credentials written via heredoc to ~/.zshrc are visible in shell history. Also echo-ed values for verification.
